key_finding: V-cache predicts correct/incorrect (AUC 0.63-0.80). V>text gap +0.09-0.11 at early bins. At 3/4 layers V-AUC>0.60 from bin 0 (first 5% of chain). L18 bin 0 AUC=0.675 p<0.001. V≈K for correctness (dissociates from K>V for answer value). Peak L35=0.798.
evidence_impact: Partially resolves exp 103 interpretation gap. V encodes computation QUALITY beyond text, from chain start. Combined with exp 101/102 functional conditioning: convergent evidence against general-features interpretation.
next_planned: Cross-model replication on Phi-3.5-mini, or difficulty-controlled classification analysis
